body.title: Tool result gist+verbatim split — raise synth cap + tool_result_verbatim TWM category
body.result: 935f2d8b — Three-layer fix: (1) raise synth prompt cap from 2KB to 40KB at main.py:5762 — modern context windows handle this trivially; (2) push full untruncated tool result to TWM at category='tool_result_verbatim' on dispatch with salience 0.85, TTL 1800s — same biomimetic gist+verbatim pattern as f0ad6dab user_input_verbatim; (3) raise user-visible fallback wrapper from 800 to 4000 at BOTH except sites (initial replace_all only caught one due to indentation difference). Ring entries (300, 500) deliberately unchanged — they're for compaction. 5 new tests including 50KB live cortex round-trip (used sentence repetition to dodge credential scrubber). 2034 total pass, zero regressions. Closes the day's queue.
body.description:
Bug 3 from 2026-04-12/13 session. main.py:5579 caps tool results at 2000 chars before feeding them to synthesis LLM. main.py:5619 fallback is 800 chars. Igor CANNOT read any file >2KB through this path — LLM only ever sees the first 2KB. Akien's test case was a 51KB transcript file; Igor saw only the first 2KB and accurately reported 'only showed a few lines of a diff'.

BIOMIMETIC FIX (same pattern as f0ad6dab): push full tool result to TWM at category='tool_result_verbatim' on dispatch. Keep synth prompt window bounded for cost but raise from 2KB to 40KB (modern context windows handle this trivially). Prompt builder includes recent tool_result_verbatim entries alongside the synth window so oversized results are still retrievable in subsequent turns via the same salience competition mechanism.

THREE SITES:
1. main.py:5579 raise 2000→40000 in synth_prompt assembly
2. main.py:5619 raise 800→4000 in fallback [tool result: ...] wrapper
3. main.py:5556 after tool.execute() add twm_push(source='tool_result_verbatim', content_csb=str(_tool_result), category='tool_result_verbatim', thread_id=thread_id, salience=0.85, urgency=0.85, ttl=1800) with full untruncated content

TESTS: nested test_tool_call_and_verbatim_fidelity.py additions — synth window cap, TWM verbatim push, retrieve-by-category round-trip.

INERTIA: LOW-MED. main.py tool dispatch path. Orthogonal to persistent-relationships epic but unblocks iteration involving file reads.
